values.content:
Extract structured event data from search results. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{"events":[{"name":"string","description":"string|null","date_info":"string|null","event_date":"YYYY-MM-DD|null","location":"string|null","organization":"string|null","url":"string|null","event_type":"string|null","confidence":0.0}]}

Rules:
- event_date must be ISO date or null
- confidence 0-1
- Only extract real events, not general pages
